Through the Years

From the Archives

A note for you

Mom, Every one of these pictures is really the same picture, taken over and over across so many years: you, right in the middle of us, making sure everyone was smiling. Thank you for every trip planned, every plate filled, every worry carried so we didn't have to. I hope this year gives back to you even a little of what you've given all of us.
— with all my love

Make a wish, Mom

tap the candles
Happy Birthday, Mom. Here's to you. 🤍
made with love, for the one who made everything possible
